creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch updates astro/josm:

	- new stable snapshot 1504
	- increase java heap size in the JOSM start script
	- build a binary that fetches images from Yahoo. The
	  binary is required by wmsplugin, that is used by 99.99% :)
	  users of JOSM. The binary brings depends on some Qt
	  components.
